prompt: Phase 5 (Issue Hierarchy) is now complete and quality-validated. Please update your expertise file to reflect the current state. Key changes from quality validation: (1) Added 12 tests: auth integration for hierarchy ops (read-only mode blocks create/update with hierarchy), CLI --parentId tests, edge cases (same status no-op, reparent from null, same parentId no-op, done parent allowed, mixed cascade, already-closed children). (2) Fixed 2 Prettier formatting issues in test files. (3) Final numbers: 284 tests, 1101 assertions, 99.31% coverage, 99.77% functions. (4) All quality gates pass: typecheck, lint, format, test:coverage, docs:check. (5) Coverage on Phase 5 code: hierarchy.ts 100%/100%, index-manager.ts 100%/100%, tracker.ts 97.96%/100%. Stage is now: Phase 5 complete, ready for Phase 6 (blockages).
